Ki Design System · v1.0 · Web 気

Ki Component
Library

The single reference for how Ki looks and behaves on the web — colour, type, spacing and every component, each defined once and shown live. Measured, crafted, unmistakably Ki.

Obviously + Noto Sans JP
Typefaces (no Barlow)
Two-tier gold
Foil #CDA043 · Digital #B88448
1200px / 6px / 4px base
Container · radius · spacing
15 sections
Page anatomy
Foundations

Principles & Voice

Ki is a premium, intentional nicotine pouch brand with a Japanese design sensibility. The system should feel calm, crafted, and confident — never loud. These principles resolve most detail questions before they start.

PrincipleWhat it means in the UI
Quiet confidenceGenerous whitespace, restrained colour, one clear action per view. Let the product and the landscape art carry the emotion.
Crafted, not decoratedEvery element earns its place. Borders and spacing do the work; avoid drop shadows, gradients on type, and ornament.
Japanese undertoneKanji and JP eyebrows appear as considered accents (Noto Sans JP), never as pastiche. The 気 mark is sacred — teal, mark only.
Intentional for adultsSober, factual tone. Compliance elements (age gate, warning bar) are first-class, not afterthoughts.
Voice in one lineMeasured, warm, precise. British spelling. Sentence case in body; UPPERCASE reserved for headings, labels, and buttons.
Foundations

Logo & Mark

The lockup is a single unit: the KI letterform with the 気 kanji at upper-right, inside a rounded square. Always place the supplied logo file — never rebuild it in type or recolour it ad hoc. The primary web mark is the monochrome lockup (Ki_Logo_Black on light, Ki_Logo_White on dark); the full-colour treatment (gold letterform, teal kanji) is reserved for packaging & print.

Primary · Monochrome
web & UI
Heritage · Colour
gold KI + teal 気
UseAsset
Light backgroundsKi_Logo_Black.svg
Dark backgroundsKi_Logo_White.svg
Heritage / packaging (colour)gold #CDA043 · teal #20BEC4

Vector source: /Logo/*.ai · *.svg · *.png. Heritage: img-ki-heritage.png.

Clear space & minimum size

Keep clear space of at least the cap-height of the K on all sides.
Minimum digital size: 28 px square. Minimum print: 8 mm.

Misuse

No stretching
No rotating
No shadows / effects
Keep contrast (never bury the mark)
Foundations

Colour Canon

A warm, paper-based neutral core; a two-tier gold; restrained warm accents; and an olive/matcha green scale for immersive sections. Click any swatch to copy its hex.

Gold — two tiers

Metallic foil cannot render on screen, so digital gold is a deliberate screen-optimised equivalent. Use foil for logomark / print / premium; digital for on-screen CTAs and accents. This replaces the old #D59F29 / #CC9F42 confusion.

AccessibilityBody text (Graphite on Paper) and all button label pairings meet WCAG AA (4.5:1). Jade, gold, terracotta and success greens are AA for large/UI text on white but should carry white text when used as fills — as specified per component.
Foundations

Typography Canon

One typeface, two weights. Obviously Regular (400) for body/nav/lead/meta and SemiBold (600) for display, headings, eyebrows and buttons — the heaviest weight the site loads. Bold/Black requests resolve to SemiBold. Japanese is Noto Sans JP. No Barlow, no serif, no Black — the web voice is lighter and more restrained than the master brand. Authority: Ki_Website_Type_Style_Guide

DisplaySemiBold 600
−0.02em · lh 1.0
68px
The pouch worth its wait
HeadingSemiBold 600
−0.01em · lh 1.05
44px
The Japanese art of getting it right
SubheadSemiBold 600
−0.01em · lh 1.1
28px
The Ki collection
EyebrowSemiBold 600
+0.04em · uppercase
16px
Precision
LeadRegular 400
lh 1.6
18px
We spent years creating the finest experience — the tin, the release, the finish — considered from the first can to the last.
BodyRegular 400
lh 1.65
15px
Rooted in a meticulous Japanese process, every detail is deliberate.
Nav / MetaRegular 400
14–16px
Collection · Our Story · FAQs — 5 products · Sort by · £7.49
JapaneseNoto Sans JP 500
26px
贈り物 · コレクション
Do
  • Two weights only: Regular 400 (body) and SemiBold 600 (everything set heavier).
  • UPPERCASE headings, tight tracking (−0.01 to −0.02em), line-height ~1.0–1.05.
  • Body Regular, sentence case, line-height ~1.6. British spelling.
  • JP katakana eyebrows (コレクション) sit above titles in Site Gold #B88448.
Don’t
  • Use Black (900) — the web voice has no Black. Display is SemiBold.
  • Introduce Barlow, Archivo, or any serif.
  • Set long body copy in uppercase.
  • Request Bold/800 expecting weight — it resolves to SemiBold.
Foundations

Spacing & Layout

A 4px base unit drives all spacing. Content maxes at 1200px with 24px gutters.

Spacing scale (4px base)

4  --s1 · inline gaps, icon nudge
8  --s2 · tight stacks
12 --s3 · control padding
16 --s4 · component padding
24 --s5 · card gaps, gutters
32 --s6 · block spacing
48 --s7 · section rhythm
64 --s8 · section padding
96 --s9 · hero / major breaks

Breakpoints

NameWidthColumns
Mobile≤ 4801
Tablet481–7682
Laptop769–10243
Desktop≥ 1025 (content 1200)3–4
Foundations

Radius, Border & Elevation

Corners are softly rounded — 6px is the workhorse (buttons, inputs), 12px for cards and panels. Depth comes from borders first; shadows are reserved for overlays.

0 · flush
4 · sm
6 · default
12 · lg
pill
TokenValueUse
--r-sm4pxChips, small inline controls.
--r6pxButtons, inputs, notifications — default.
--r-lg12pxCards, panels, modals.
--shadow-10 1px 2px rgba(17,17,17,.06)Hover lift on cards.
--shadow-modal0 24px 64px rgba(17,17,17,.20)Age gate & overlays only.
Foundations

Ki Collection

Five flavours, each with a Japanese name and a pairing colour. Product imagery is always the real 3/4 puck render on white — never illustrated. Katakana eyebrow set in Site Gold above the collection, exactly as it appears on the site.

Pairing colours

Yuzu → Green #93B24A Hokkaido → Mint #7CB8A6 Satsuma → Orange #E0862B Maple → Brown #7A4E2B Cola → Red #C63D2E
RuleKatakana eyebrow (コレクション) sits above the title in Site Gold #B88448. Renders source: /marketing-materials/assets/products/pucks/*_01 (3/4 hero angle). Eight angles per flavour are available.
Components

Hero

Full-bleed layered-landscape art (real asset) with the flavour puck. Gold Japanese eyebrow, Display heading in white, and a Sage primary CTA — no dark overlay; legibility comes from a subtle text-shadow only.

コレクション
The pouch
worth its wait
We spent years creating the finest experience — considered from the first can to the last.
Art: real homepage landscape (KI_BACK_17). Heading Obviously SemiBold 46px, white with a soft text-shadow.
Components

Buttons

Obviously SemiBold 600, uppercase, +0.04em tracking, 6px radius. One primary action per view. Per the Type Style Guide, the marketing primary CTA is Sage (white on #619C8A); Ink is the commerce/checkout primary. Hover darkens the fill; disabled drops to 40% opacity.

Live buttons — hover to see states.
VariantFillHoverUse
Primary · Ink#111111#000000The primary action: Add to Cart, Submit.
Secondary · Outlinetransparent · 2px #111fill #111 / #fffSecondary action beside a primary.
Gold · Digital#B88448#A0753DAccount & premium actions (Create Account).
Sage · Primary CTA#619C8A#517F70Primary marketing CTA (Find Your Flavour), often with →.
Terracotta · Accent#BE7C42#A8692FWarm editorial CTA (Our Story).

Sizes

Do
  • Exactly one primary (Ink or Jade) per view.
  • Keep labels 1–3 words, uppercase.
  • Use Gold for account/premium, not generic CTAs.
Don’t
  • Stack two filled buttons of equal weight.
  • Use square 2px corners (old deck spec) — radius is 6px.
  • Map Create Account to terracotta — it is Gold.
Components

Strength Toggle

Segmented control for nicotine strength. Selected segment is Ink; the group shares one 6px-radius border.

Selected = Ink #111 · Unselected = white, Ink text
Components

Forms & Inputs

White fill, warm 1.5px border (--border), 6px radius. Uppercase label above; required marked with a terracotta-red asterisk. Focus ring in terracotta.

Enter a valid email address.
Bulk discounts apply at checkout.
PropertyValue
Fill / border#FFFFFF · 1.5px #D6D2C8
Radius / padding6px · 11×14
LabelObviously 700 · 11px · +0.08em · uppercase · Slate
Focusborder Terracotta + 3px rgba(190,124,66,.15) ring
Errorborder/text #C0492F
Components

Product Card

As shipped on dev.ki.bio/shop: white image well with a single 3/4 puck render, uppercase title, price in Meta, strength toggle and quantity select. In stock uses the Ink Add to Cart; “coming soon” shows a red status dot and a Gold “Email me when available”.

Yuzu Mint
£7.49 – £60.00
Satsuma Citrus
£7.49 – £60.00 Coming soon
ElementSpec
Surface#FFF · 1px #E3E1DC · r 12
Image well#FFFFFF · single 3/4 render
TitleSemiBold 600 · 14 · UPPER
PriceRegular 400 · 14 · Meta
In-stock CTAPrimary Ink · full-width
Coming soonred dot + Gold CTA
Components

Notifications & Banners

Two solid greens that never clash: Success = Moss, Info/Coupon = Forest. When they stack (e.g. checkout), they read as distinct.

✓ Coupon code applied successfully.
% Have a coupon? Click here to enter your code.
! That code has expired. Try another.
Do
  • Success → Moss #7A8646; Info/Coupon → Forest #3C4A2C.
  • Keep 6px radius and white text on green fills.
Don’t
  • Place two similar greens adjacent (the original clash).
  • Use Jade for success — Jade is a CTA colour.
Components

Warning Bar & Benefit Ticker Regulated

The statutory warning is fixed to the top of every page. Wording and coverage are legally mandated — confirm exact copy with compliance before any change.

This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is a highly addictive substance.
Natural sweetenersPlant-basedFree shipping
Compliance noteWarning ground is Ink #111 with white text, full-width, fixed top. Under UK rules the warning must occupy a mandated minimum area and use the prescribed wording — treat this as a legal, not stylistic, element.
Components

FAQ Accordion & Tabs

Tasting NotesReviewsIngredients
What is in Ki? ×
Plant-based nicotine pouches with natural sweeteners and food-grade fillers. Full ingredient list on every can.
How strong is each pouch? +
Available in 3MG and 9MG. Choose your strength on any product.
How long does the flavour last? +
Typically 20–40 minutes, depending on the pouch.

Question: Obviously 700 uppercase. Toggle mark in Terracotta (× when open, + when closed). 1px Line divider between rows. Active tab underlined in Terracotta.

Header / nav

KI気CollectionOur StoryFAQsCollaborateCart (0)

ShopCollectionGift of KiBundles

Footer ground: Mist #F3F4F6. The account CTA uses Gold (digital), not terracotta.

Components

Age Gate

First-visit modal over the hero. Landscape art left; confirmation right with the Ki mark. Yes = Ink primary; No = outline.

KI気
Age Confirmation
Ki is designed with intention for adults 18 and over. Is that you?

Overlay shadow: --shadow-modal. Modal radius 12px. Retain the warning bar above the overlay.

System

Page Anatomy — 15 Sections

The homepage assembles from these blocks, top to bottom. Each maps to components above.

#SectionKey tokens / components
01Warning BarInk ground, white text, fixed top — statutory.
02Header / NavLogo, nav links, cart.
03HeroFull-bleed landscape, Display Obviously 900, Jade CTA.
04Gift BlockPaper ground, JP eyebrow, Terracotta + outline CTAs.
05Split Banner50/50, darkened photo, green overlay, white outline CTA.
06Feature GridTicker + 4-up icon/title/body.
07Product CardsProduct Card component.
08Product Listing3-col grid, sort select, meta.
09CollectionRow of products, per-flavour accent.
10Story BlocksMoss/olive ground, Display heading, dividers.
11Tasting NotesTabs, terracotta underline, radar/list.
12FAQAccordion component.
13ContactForm component, Ink submit.
14CollaborateMoss→terracotta banner, Display heading.
15FooterFooter component, Gold account CTA.

Applications

Social — Phase One

The launch feed: product on its own bright landscape, three-tin sets, and reason-to-believe cards. 9:16 for stories, 1:1 for grid — and every ground is a bright Ki landscape, never a dark one.

Source: social/phase-one · 1080 exports (SKU · trio · landscape).
